# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# Kafka Broker Server Properties - Production Configuration

############################# Server Basics #############################

# The id of the broker. This must be set to a unique integer for each broker.
broker.id=0

# Enable auto generation of broker id if not set
# broker.id.generation.enable=true

############################# Socket Server Settings #############################

# The address the socket server listens on. It will get the value returned from 
# java.net.InetAddress.getCanonicalHostName() if not configured.
#   FORMAT:
#     listeners = listener_name://host_name:port
#   EXAMPLE:
#     listeners = PLAINTEXT://your.host.name:9092

# Listener name, hostname and port the broker will advertise to clients
listeners=PLAINTEXT://:9092,SSL://:9093,SASL_SSL://:9094

# Hostname and port the broker will advertise to producers and consumers
advertised.listeners=PLAINTEXT://kafka-broker-0:9092,SSL://kafka-broker-0:9093,SASL_SSL://kafka-broker-0:9094

# Maps listener names to security protocols
listener.security.protocol.map=PLAINTEXT:PLAINTEXT,SSL:SSL,SASL_SSL:SASL_SSL

# The number of threads that the server uses for receiving requests from the network
num.network.threads=8

# The number of threads that the server uses for processing requests
num.io.threads=16

# The send buffer (SO_SNDBUF) used by the socket server
socket.send.buffer.bytes=102400

# The receive buffer (SO_RCVBUF) used by the socket server
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=102400

# The maximum size of a request that the socket server will accept
socket.request.max.bytes=104857600

############################# Log Basics #############################

# A comma separated list of directories under which to store log files
log.dirs=/var/lib/kafka/data-1,/var/lib/kafka/data-2,/var/lib/kafka/data-3

# The default number of log partitions per topic
num.partitions=6

# The number of threads per data directory to be used for log recovery at startup
num.recovery.threads.per.data.dir=2

############################# Internal Topic Settings  #############################

# The replication factor for the group metadata internal topics
offsets.topic.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.min.isr=2

############################# Log Flush Policy #############################

# Messages are immediately written to the filesystem but by default we only fsync() to sync
# the OS cache lazily. The following configurations control the flush of data to disk.

# The number of messages to accept before forcing a flush of data to disk
#log.flush.interval.messages=10000

# The maximum amount of time a message can sit in a log before we force a flush
#log.flush.interval.ms=1000

############################# Log Retention Policy #############################

# The minimum age of a log file to be eligible for deletion due to age
log.retention.hours=168

# A size-based retention policy for logs
#log.retention.bytes=1073741824

# The maximum size of a log segment file. When this size is reached a new log segment will be created.
log.segment.bytes=1073741824

# The interval at which log segments are checked to see if they can be deleted
log.retention.check.interval.ms=300000

############################# Zookeeper #############################

# Zookeeper connection string (see zookeeper docs for details).
zookeeper.connect=zk-1:2181,zk-2:2181,zk-3:2181/kafka

# Timeout in ms for connecting to zookeeper
zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms=18000

# Zookeeper session timeout
zookeeper.session.timeout.ms=18000

############################# Group Coordinator Settings #############################

# The following configuration specifies the time, in milliseconds, that the GroupCoordinator will delay the initial consumer rebalance.
group.initial.rebalance.delay.ms=3000

############################# Replication Settings #############################

# The default replication factor for automatically created topics
default.replication.factor=3

# Min number of replicas that must acknowledge a write for it to be considered successful
min.insync.replicas=2

# The number of acknowledgments the producer requires the leader to have received before considering a request complete
# This is set on the producer side but can be enforced broker-side
# acks=all (or -1) is recommended for production

# Enables auto creation of topic on the server
auto.create.topics.enable=false

# When a producer sets acks to "all" (or "-1"), min.insync.replicas specifies the minimum number of replicas
# that must acknowledge a write for the write to be considered successful

# Number of fetcher threads used to replicate messages from a source broker
num.replica.fetchers=4

# The socket timeout for network requests to the leader for replicating data
replica.socket.timeout.ms=30000

# The socket receive buffer for network requests to the leader for replicating data
replica.socket.receive.buffer.bytes=65536

# The number of bytes of messages to attempt to fetch for each partition
replica.fetch.max.bytes=1048576

# Maximum wait time for each fetcher request issued by follower replicas
replica.fetch.wait.max.ms=500

# Minimum bytes expected for each fetch response
replica.fetch.min.bytes=1

# Number of fetcher threads used to replicate messages from leaders
num.replica.fetchers=4

# Frequency with which the log cleaner checks whether any log is eligible for deletion
replica.lag.time.max.ms=30000

############################# Log Cleaner Settings #############################

# Enable the log cleaner process to run on the server
log.cleaner.enable=true

# The number of background threads to use for log cleaning
log.cleaner.threads=2

# The log cleaner will be throttled so that the sum of its read and write i/o will be less than this value
log.cleaner.io.max.bytes.per.second=1.7976931348623157E308

# The total memory used for log deduplication across all cleaner threads
log.cleaner.dedupe.buffer.size=134217728

# The interval between checks to see if any logs need cleaning
log.cleaner.backoff.ms=15000

# The minimum ratio of dirty log to total log for a log to eligible for cleaning
log.cleaner.min.cleanable.ratio=0.5

# How long are delete records retained
log.cleaner.delete.retention.ms=86400000

############################# Compression Settings #############################

# Specify the final compression type for a given topic
compression.type=producer

############################# Performance Settings #############################

# The number of threads doing disk I/O
num.io.threads=16

# The number of threads handling network requests
num.network.threads=8

# The number of queued requests allowed before blocking the network threads
queued.max.requests=500

# Background threads to process requests
background.threads=10

############################# Metric Reporter Settings #############################

# The metrics reporters
metric.reporters=

# The window of time a metrics sample is computed over
metrics.sample.window.ms=30000

# The number of samples maintained to compute metrics
metrics.num.samples=2

# The highest recording level for metrics
metrics.recording.level=INFO

############################# Controller Settings #############################

# The number of threads to use for various background processing tasks
controlled.shutdown.enable=true
controlled.shutdown.max.retries=3
controlled.shutdown.retry.backoff.ms=5000

############################# Producer/Consumer Settings #############################

# Max size of message
message.max.bytes=1048576

# Max size a single batch can be
replica.fetch.max.bytes=1048576

# Max message size consumers can fetch
fetch.message.max.bytes=1048576

############################# Security Settings #############################

# Broker security settings
# Uncomment and configure as needed for SSL/SASL

# SSL Configuration
#ssl.keystore.location=/var/private/ssl/kafka.server.keystore.jks
#ssl.keystore.password=your-keystore-password
#ssl.key.password=your-key-password
#ssl.truststore.location=/var/private/ssl/kafka.server.truststore.jks
#ssl.truststore.password=your-truststore-password
#ssl.client.auth=required
#ssl.enabled.protocols=TLSv1.2,TLSv1.3
#ssl.protocol=TLS

# SASL Configuration
#sasl.enabled.mechanisms=PLAIN,SCRAM-SHA-256,SCRAM-SHA-512
#sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=PLAIN

# Inter-broker communication settings
inter.broker.listener.name=PLAINTEXT
inter.broker.protocol.version=3.0

############################# Additional Production Settings #############################

# Delete topic enable
delete.topic.enable=true

# Rack awareness for replica assignment
#broker.rack=rack1

# Unclean leader election
unclean.leader.election.enable=false

# Leader imbalance settings
auto.leader.rebalance.enable=true
leader.imbalance.per.broker.percentage=10
leader.imbalance.check.interval.seconds=300

# Connection settings
connections.max.idle.ms=600000
max.connections.per.ip=2147483647
#max.connections.per.ip.overrides=

# Request timeout
request.timeout.ms=30000

# Quota settings for production rate limiting
#quota.producer.default=10485760
#quota.consumer.default=10485760

# Log message format version
log.message.format.version=3.0
log.message.timestamp.type=CreateTime

# Offset settings
offsets.retention.minutes=10080
offsets.commit.timeout.ms=5000
